title: Fix marking `AstVar`s as class members
body:
This PR solves the issue where every `AstVar`, that was not a parameter, was considered a class member if it was in a subtree of `AstClass`. In this change I mark only the toplevel `AstVar`s as class members. This was causing `isClassMember()` to be unreliable.

For example, [constraint cloning](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/3dd2b762e7572b36c736229a4a9eb82339aa9001/src/V3Randomize.cpp#L302) in `V3Randomize.cpp` was failing, because a loop variable inside `foreach` was copied as class member.
